painPoints.title: Say Goodbye to the 6 Nightmares of Traditional Ad Buying

items.traditional: Each platform built separately, wasting 10+ hours on repeat work
items.swads: One input — AI auto-generates all platform plans in 10 minutes

items.traditional: Managing 10+ platform accounts simultaneously, tedious and error-prone
items.swads: One dashboard manages all accounts, with one-click bulk operations

items.traditional: Different rules for every platform, steep learning curve
items.swads: No need to learn platform rules — AI auto-adapts all details

items.traditional: Data scattered across platforms, impossible to analyze holistically
items.swads: Cross-platform data aggregation, one board for global performance

items.traditional: Poor support for emerging market platforms, no automation tools
items.swads: Deep optimization for Transsion, Yandex and other high-growth platforms

items.traditional: No change tracking, mistakes can't be undone
items.swads: Full-platform versioning, all changes traceable and reversible
